query: Show me forecast workload vs available craft capacity for next 4 weeks
expected_behavior: Loads BOTH maximo-labor-resources AND maximo-pm-planning (composition — workload-vs-capacity is the canonical cross-skill query for these two)
Workload side: uses v_pm_workload_by_craft or pm_workload_hours UDF (pm-planning), grouped by craft × week
Capacity side: uses v_crew_capacity or crew_capacity_hours UDF (labor-resources), summing WORKPERIOD scheduled hours net of MODAVAIL absences
Probes WORKPERIOD coverage before claiming capacity — if rows don't exist for the forecast window, surfaces that explicitly
Filters PM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' and uses COALESCE(EXTDATE, NEXTDATE) for the effective due date
Returns gap (workload − capacity) by craft × week, flagged OVER/OK/UNDER
